rtl_guidelines.html_setup: MUST set <html dir="rtl" lang="he"> in index.html.
rtl_guidelines.css_logic: Always use logical properties: ps-*, pe-*, ms-*, me-*, text-start, text-end. Avoid static left/right values like pl-, pr-, ml-, mr-, text-left, text-right.
rtl_guidelines.layout_mirroring: Sidebar should slide in from the right. Icons typically on the left of text should move to the right.
rtl_guidelines.flex_grids: Tailwind naturally reverses flex-row and grid-cols in RTL. Do NOT manually reverse arrays.

fonts.setup_instruction: Import Heebo and Assistant from Google Fonts in index.html or global css.

surfaces_and_glassmorphism.app_background: Use a deep obsidian base (bg-[#0A0A0B]) with abstract subtle ambient gradients (e.g., a massive 1000px radial gradient of #2563EB with 5% opacity in the top-right).
surfaces_and_glassmorphism.cards: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 rounded-3xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]
surfaces_and_glassmorphism.buttons_primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white font-medium py-4 px-6 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 min-h-[56px]
surfaces_and_glassmorphism.inputs: bg-black/40 border border-white/10 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 rounded-2xl text-white py-4 px-4 min-h-[56px] w-full

layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: Use asymmetrical bento grids for the 4 content folders. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 md:gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.padding: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 inside cards. Section gaps py-16.
layout_and_spacing.mobile_first: Ensure all interactive targets are thumb-friendly (min-h-[56px]). Bottom padding should account for mobile browsers.

components_strategy.shadcn_customization: Heavily customize Shadcn to remove standard light borders. Replace radiuses with rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl. Replace solid card backgrounds with glassmorphism classes.
components_strategy.sidebar: Mobile sidebar must be a glassmorphic sheet (Sheet component from Shadcn) sliding in from the RIGHT (RTL).
components_strategy.audio_recorder: Large, central, glowing mic button. When active, pulsate with an inner shadow and border-blue-500.
components_strategy.history_list: Cardless layout for rows: py-4 border-b border-white/5. Hover adds bg-white/5 rounded-xl.

hero_abstract_bg.description: Abstract metallic rings with glowing orb, use as highly blurred background element (opacity-20, fixed).

daily_snack_cover.description: Wooden spinning top on dark surface, use for the Daily Snack feature hero image.

user_avatar.description: Man wearing glasses and a black turtleneck. Use as default profile avatar.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: All interactive elements must scale slightly (scale-95 on active, scale-105 on hover for icons) and brighten.
motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Fade in with a slight upward translation (translate-y-4 to translate-y-0, opacity-0 to opacity-100).

testing_attributes.rule: MANDATORY: Add data-testid to all actionable elements.
